creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 239643
git format-patch

slurm is still alive on GitHub, and has moved from 0.3.3 to 0.4.4 since
the port was deprecated and deleted.

This patch resurrects the port and makes a few changes to bring it up to
date with the current version.

The new WWW is https://github.com/mattthias/slurm/wiki/

QA:
- builds and runs under poudriere for the following versions:
  * 13.1-amd64
  * 12.3-amd64
  * 12.3-i386
-portlint ok
-portclippy is happy
